Navigate to the System codes UI and search for code type 000 PAGEREF _Toc1036358596 \h 3 - Select Global Extension Control PAGEREF _Toc1727718527 \h 3 - Input the below information if not already configured and “Save” PAGEREF _Toc1586773061 \h 3 1.2 Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 506-506 PAGEREF _Toc279183651 \h 5 1.2.1 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 506-506 PAGEREF _Toc1885440312 \h 6 1.3 Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518 PAGEREF _Toc1015176447 \h 7 1.3.1 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518 PAGEREF _Toc1455027287 \h 7 1.4 Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master PAGEREF _Toc1031110639 \h 9 1.4.1 Configuring Error Messages PAGEREF _Toc1769224141 \h 9 EX 18 C ustom Pallet Prompt Configurations Follow below steps to configure Custom Pallet Prompt for RF Menu Pck Cubed Dir Transaction System Codes Configuration – Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control , C-000-EX 18 Extension Control Adding Global Extension Code ID to the global extension Navigate to the System codes UI and search for code type 000 Select Global E xtension C ontrol Input the below information if not already configured and “Save” Select Parameters Add in following information and hit “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Select C-000-EX 18 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 50 6 -50 6 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 506-506 Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “ Pck Cubed Dir ” under transaction name. Click on “ Pck Cubed Dir ” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right C lick “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below Hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” Click on “Pck Cubed Dir” transaction Select “Parameters” tab and c lick “Edit” Go to Byte 506-506 EX18 Extension Control Check the Y/N flag and “save” Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518 Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “Pck Cubed Dir -CRT ” under transaction name. Click on “Pck Cubed Dir -CRT ” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right Click “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below Hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” Click on “Pck Cubed Dir -CRT ” transaction Select “Parameters” tab and click “Edit” Go to Byte 5 18 -5 18 EX18 Extension Control Check the Y/N flag and “save” Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master Configur ing Error Message s Enter “Messages” UI Click on “ Message Master ” S elect + sign to add new message and configure per below Module   Message ID   Message Class   Message Type   Message Detail Value   Custom  1801  System  ERROR  Pallet contains other oLPNs   Custom  1802  System  ERROR  Pallet already scanned  (Text value in EX 18 Extension Spec as well)

[Document: MCLN EX18 RF Pack Cubed (Directed) - Custom Pallet Prompt Config Guide]

EX18 – RF Pack Cubed (Directed) - Custom Pallet Prompt Contents  EX18 Custom Pallet Prompt Configurations  1.1 System Codes Configuration – Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX18 Extension Control  1.1.1 Adding Global Extension Code ID to the global extension  - Navigate to the System codes UI and search for code type 000  - Select Global Extension Control  - Input the below information if not already configured and “Save”  1.2 Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 506-506  1.2.1 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 506-506  1.3 Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518  1.3.1 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518  1.4 Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master  1.4.1 Configuring Error Messages  EX 18 C ustom Pallet Prompt Configurations Follow below steps to configure Custom Pallet Prompt for RF Menu Pck Cubed Dir Transaction System Codes Configuration – Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control , C-000-EX 18 Extension Control Adding Global Extension Code ID to the global extension Navigate to the System codes UI and search for code type 000 Select Global E xtension C ontrol Input the below information if not already configured and “Save” Select Parameters Add in following information and hit “Save” Select Code IDs Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Click “Add” Input the below information and “Save” Select C-000-EX 18 Open the “Parameters Tab” Check the Y/N Flag and “Save” Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 50 6 -50 6 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 506-506 Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “ Pck Cubed Dir ” under transaction name. Click on “ Pck Cubed Dir ” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right C lick “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below Hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” Click on “Pck Cubed Dir” transaction Select “Parameters” tab and c lick “Edit” Go to Byte 506-506 EX18 Extension Control Check the Y/N flag and “save” Transaction Parameters Configuration – Add 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518 Adding 61 Pck Cubed Dir Byte 518-518 Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “Pck Cubed Dir -CRT ” under transaction name.

Click on “Pck Cubed Dir -CRT ” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right Click “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below Hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” Click on “Pck Cubed Dir -CRT ” transaction Select “Parameters” tab and click “Edit” Go to Byte 5 18 -5 18 EX18 Extension Control Check the Y/N flag and “save” Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master Configur ing Error Message s Enter “Messages” UI Click on “ Message Master ” S elect + sign to add new message and configure per below Module   Message ID   Message Class   Message Type   Message Detail Value   Custom  1801  System  ERROR  Pallet contains other oLPNs   Custom  1802  System  ERROR  Pallet already scanned  (Text value in EX 18 Extension Spec as well)
